Skill.Name: Bow Shot
Skill.Description: Fire a projectile at an enemy character

Skill.Name: Dirty Fighting
Skill.Description: Ignore the codes of honor to deal additional damage

Skill.Name: Low Blow
Skill.Description: -DEF % to target

Skill.Name: Coup de Grace
Skill.ToolTip: A critical hit on a crippled enemy
Skill.Description: Guaranteed crit on a crippled enemy, costs no mana

Skill.Name: Stealth
Skill.Description: Enter Stealth, and become able to attack the back row

Skill.Name: Backstab
Skill.Description: Stab an enemy in the back. Requires Stealth

Skill.Name: Cripple
Skill.Description: Inflict Crippled on an enemy. Requires Stealth

Skill.Name: Disarm
Skill.Description: -ATK % to target. Requires Stealth, costs no mana

Skill.Name: Ambush
Skill.Description: Attacks all enemies in any column. Requires Stealth

Skill.Name: Exploit Weakness
Skill.Description: Massive short-term self melee attack buff.

Skill.Name: Evasion
Skill.Description: +Dodge %

Skill.Name: Harsh Language
Skill.Description: Doubles enemies' skill cost

Skill.Name: Bravado
Skill.Description: Increase your ability to make critical hits

Skill.Name: Confuse
Skill.Description: Cripples enemy

Skill.Name: Feign Death
Skill.ToolTip: Enemies will ignore you so you can recoup
Skill.Description: Cause enemies to attack your allies while you recoup, costs no mana

Skill.Name: Throw Voice
Skill.Description: Cause adjacent enemies to attack your target

Skill.Name: Piercing Shot
Skill.ToolTip: An arrow that hits the entire row
Skill.Description: Attack all enemies in a row

Skill.Name: Pinning Shot
Skill.ToolTip: An arrow that damages and cripples the target
Skill.Description: Damage and inflict Crippled on target

Skill.Name: Deadly Shot
Skill.Description: Fire a powerful arrow that causes increased damage

Skill.Name: Frost Arrow
Skill.ToolTip: A freezing arrow that hits several targets
Skill.Description: Fire a freezing arrow that damages and immobilizes a target and applies a weaker effect to adjacent foes

Skill.Name: Poison Arrow
Skill.ToolTip: An arrow that poisons and weakens the target
Skill.Description: Damage, poison, and weaken the target

Skill.Name: Rapid Shot
Skill.Description: Fire a blindingly fast arrow that does not end your turn

Skill.Name: Double Shot
Skill.Description: Shoot two arrows at your target

Skill.Name: Mass Volley

StatAction.CustomDescription: Attack all foes after a 2, 3, and 4 turn delay

Skill.Description: Attack all enemies thrice after a delay

Skill.Name: New Mass Volley
Skill.Description: Attack all enemies 3 times after a delay, +1 attack after 9 upgrades

Skill.Name: Suppressing Fire
Skill.ToolTip: Cripple and damage a row of enemies
Skill.Description: Cripple and damage a row of enemies

Skill.Name: Ranged Weapon Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases the accuracy of equipped ranged weapons

Skill.Name: Blade Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and defense when a dagger or sword is equipped

Skill.Name: Dual Wield Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and agility when a dual-wield weapon is equipped

Skill.Name: Longbow Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and agility when a bow is equipped

Skill.Name: Crossbow Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases attack power and luck when a crossbow is equipped

Skill.Name: Vicious
Skill.Description: Increases your bonus to crit

Skill.Name: Mark of Death
Skill.Description: Lowers all of an enemy's resistances this turn. Costs no mana.

Skill.Name: Assassinate
Skill.ToolTip: High damage melee, double to disabled foes
Skill.Description: High damage attack that deals double damage to disabled foes

Skill.Name: Smoke Bomb
Skill.Description: Reduces the attack of all enemies

Skill.Name: Pandemonium
Skill.Description: Causes all foes to fight one another

Skill.Name: Bardic Grace
Skill.Description: Increases your chance to dodge attacks.

Skill.Name: Song of Valor
Skill.ToolTip: Increases team's damage and damage resistance.
Skill.Description: Increases your team's damage and damage resistance.

Skill.Name: Song of Courage
Skill.Description: Increase your team's ability to make critical hits

Skill.Name: Distraction
Skill.Description: Saps strength from some adjacent enemies, weakening them

Skill.Name: Captivating Song
Skill.Description: Captivates adjacent foes, stunning them, doesn't end turn.

Skill.Name: Dueling
Skill.Description: Raises your agility

Skill.Name: Upset Balance
Skill.Description: Reduces foe defense and does not end your turn

Skill.Name: Unending Flurry
Skill.Description: Batter one enemy with 6 attacks in a row

Skill.Name: Poison Rain
Skill.ToolTip: Arrows that poison the target and adjacent foes
Skill.Description: Poison the target and adjacent foes

Skill.Name: Whirlwind
Skill.Description: Massive damage to one foe, and minor damage to the rest

Skill.Name: Poison Daggers
Skill.ToolTip: Daggers that poison the target and adjacent foes
Skill.Description: Poison the target and adjacent foes
